parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: `🚨 COIN Education — Workflow Error\n\n` + `Workflow: ${$json.workflow_name}\n` + `Node: ${$json.error_node}\n` + `Error: ${$json.error_message}\n` + `Execution: ${$json.execution_id}\n` + `Time: ${$json.timestamp_est} EST\n\n` + `View Execution →` }) }}

parameters.name: Body
